body: Let's see if this speeds up the docs build.

labels.description: Tests get priority in case of emergency evacuation
labels.name: testing 🧪

title: Use multiple processes to execute `examples` in make.jl

body:
- `Docs/Physics/HydrostaticFreeSurfaceModel`
  At the moment docs mention that we obtain $w(x, y, z, t)$ by integrating the mass conservation equation from bottom to top but we need to integrate from bottom to depth $z$. This PR fixes this.

- `Docs/Physics/NonHydrostaticModel`
  The rotation rate term due to surface waves was missing a sign.
title: Fix typos in Docs
